preBuildHooks.windows/*: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $roots = @(); if ($env:WAILS_PROJECT_DIR) { $roots += $env:WAILS_PROJECT_DIR }; if ($env:WAILS_APPDIR) { $roots += $env:WAILS_APPDIR }; $roots += (Resolve-Path '.').Path; $c = @(); foreach ($r in $roots) { $c += (Join-Path $r 'scripts/generate-version.ps1') }; $c += @('scripts/generate-version.ps1','../scripts/generate-version.ps1','../../scripts/generate-version.ps1','../../../scripts/generate-version.ps1'); foreach ($p in $c) { if (Test-Path $p) { & $p; exit 0 } }; throw 'scripts/generate-version.ps1 not found. cwd=' + (Resolve-Path '.').Path }"

info.comments: A mod manager for Subway Builder
